response: This code computes all connected components (groups of mutually reachable nodes) of an input graph stored as an adjacency list, using Breadth-First Search (BFS) as its core traversal algorithm. It maintains a set of visited nodes to avoid reprocessing, iterating over every graph node to launch a BFS that explores all reachable unvisited nodes to build a new connected component, collecting all components into a list to return.
